text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oguri! I heard a rumor you were eating ramen
while walking through the halls. Is this true?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. An emergency came up during my meal. I
couldn't let my noodles get cold, though. It'd be
rude to the person who made them.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened... The disciplinary
committee shouldn't overlook a violation of the
rules, but I suppose it was unusual circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
However, hot soup is still dangerous to walk
around with, so I hope it won't happen again.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll be careful. Thanks for understanding.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Please, it's totally fine! You should never let food
get spoiled after all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and what was that emergency you had
anyway?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That? I heard the home ec class was giving away
cupcakes to the first twenty people who showed
up!
